coverage.name: Traditional Photographer
coverage.description: A skilled photographer specialising in classic, well-composed wedding photography. Captures formal portraits, family groups, rituals, and key moments with perfect lighting and timeless framing. The backbone of every complete wedding album.

coverage.name: Candid Photographer
coverage.description: A documentary-style photographer who captures real emotions, unposed reactions, and spontaneous moments as they happen. Works invisibly with a long lens — laughter, tears, stolen glances. The images that make you feel the day all over again.

coverage.name: Traditional Videographer
coverage.description: Full-day video coverage of your wedding in the traditional style — complete ritual documentation, family speeches, and ceremony footage. Delivers a comprehensive video record of every important moment, perfect for families who want nothing missed.

coverage.name: Candid Videographer
coverage.description: A videographer who shoots in a fly-on-the-wall documentary style — capturing candid moments, natural interactions, and raw emotion on video. Pairs beautifully with a candid photographer to build a complete candid storytelling package.

coverage.name: Cinematic Videographer
coverage.description: A cinema-grade filmmaker who treats your wedding like a short film. Uses professional cinema cameras, gimbals, and wireless audio to produce a colour-graded, score-matched wedding film. Delivers a highlight film and full-length edit that moves audiences every time it plays.

coverage.name: Motion Candid Videographer
coverage.description: Combines the emotional spontaneity of candid videography with cinematic motion techniques — slow motion, creative angles, and dynamic movement. Specialises in capturing the energy of dances, processions, and crowd moments in a way that static coverage cannot.

coverage.name: Helicam (Drone)
coverage.description: DGCA-certified aerial drone operator with cinema-grade equipment. Captures sweeping overhead shots of your venue, aerial couple portraits, procession coverage, and landscape sequences. Adds a cinematic scale impossible from the ground. Subject to airspace clearance.

coverage.name: Live Streaming
coverage.description: Professional multi-camera live stream of your ceremony broadcast to a private link, so family and friends who cannot attend in person can watch in real time. Includes a dedicated streaming technician, HD cameras, and a private URL shared with your guest list.

coverage.name: Live Print
coverage.description: An on-site instant printing station that produces high-quality 4×6 prints within seconds of being captured. Guests collect their photographs in real time throughout the function. Includes a dedicated print attendant, branded print frames, and unlimited prints for the duration.

coverage.name: AI Photo Sharing
coverage.description: An AI-powered face-recognition photo sharing system. Guests register their face via a QR code and automatically receive every photo they appear in — straight to their phone, in real time. No more waiting weeks for a gallery. Everyone leaves with their memories the same day.

coverage.name: Photo Booth
coverage.description: A fully styled, staffed photo booth with a premium backdrop, props, and instant prints. Guests receive branded printed keepsakes on the day; you receive a complete digital gallery of all booth images. A crowd favourite at every age group — from grandparents to children.

deliverables.name: Wedding E-Invitation
deliverables.description: A beautifully designed digital wedding invitation card, personalised with your names, event details, and theme. Ready to share instantly via WhatsApp, Instagram, and email. Includes animated and static versions.

deliverables.name: Photographs — Soft Copies (200 Edited)
deliverables.description: 200 professionally edited and highlighted images from your event, carefully selected and colour-graded by our team. Perfect for sharing on social media, printing, and framing. Delivered via a private high-resolution download gallery.

deliverables.name: All Unprocessed & Unsorted Pics - Soft Copies
deliverables.description: The complete raw photograph collection from your event - every frame captured throughout the day, delivered as high-resolution unedited files.

deliverables.name: Signature Album
deliverables.description: A premium handcrafted signature wedding album featuring your most treasured photographs, designed by our team. Lay-flat binding, archival print quality, available in leather or linen cover. The centrepiece of your wedding collection.

deliverables.name: 4 Designed Albums — 12"×15", 80 Pages
deliverables.description: Four matching premium designed albums, each 12"×15" with 40 leaves (80 pages), featuring the same layout and print quality. Ideal for gifting to both sets of parents and close family — everyone gets a copy of the full story.

deliverables.name: 4 Mini Notebook Albums
deliverables.description: Four compact notebook-style albums that replicate the design and page layout of the main albums in a smaller, portable format. A charming keepsake for siblings, grandparents, and the wedding party.

deliverables.name: Two Premium Family Photo Frames
deliverables.description: Two large-format premium framed prints, ready to hang. Each frame is customised with a photograph selected by you, printed on archival canvas or fine art paper and mounted in a solid wood or metal frame. A lasting centrepiece for your home.

deliverables.name: Memory Box
deliverables.description: A handcrafted keepsake memory box housing your most treasured wedding mementos — prints, the invitation, a USB with your digital gallery, and personalised inserts. Presented as a complete archival package. A gift that lasts generations.

deliverables.name: Pre-Wedding / Post-Wedding Video (3–5 min)
deliverables.description: A cinematic short film shot at a location of your choice before or after your wedding — your love story told as a visual narrative. Score-matched, colour-graded, and delivered in 4K. Perfect as a film opener or a standalone keepsake.

deliverables.name: Four Reels — Any Function (30 sec–1 min)
deliverables.description: Four short, punchy social media reels from any four functions of your wedding — mehendi, sangeet, ceremony, reception. Each reel is 30 seconds to 1 minute, music-driven, and optimised for Instagram and WhatsApp sharing.

deliverables.name: Event Teaser (1–2 min)
deliverables.description: A fast-paced, music-driven teaser edit of your wedding, typically delivered within 48 hours of your event. 1 to 2 minutes of your most cinematic moments — the first film you share with the world while the full edit is in production.

deliverables.name: Cinematic Highlights (7–10 min)
deliverables.description: A crafted 7–10 minute cinematic highlights film — the definitive version of your wedding day on screen. Covers every key moment from getting ready to the last dance, score-matched to music that fits your story, colour-graded to a cinematic look.

deliverables.name: Full Function Film
deliverables.description: Complete documentary coverage of your full wedding function — every ritual, every speech, every dance, in full. Duration varies based on the length of your function. The uncut record of your day exactly as it happened, for families who want nothing left out.

deliverables.name: Photographs — Soft Copies (100 Edited)
deliverables.description: 100 professionally edited and highlighted images from your event, carefully selected and colour-graded by our team. Ideal for social media sharing, printing, and framing. Delivered via a private high-resolution download gallery.

deliverables.name: 2 Designed Albums — 12"×15", 100 Pages
deliverables.description: Two premium designed albums, each 12"×15" with 50 leaves (100 pages), featuring a full custom layout crafted by our design team. Archival print quality with lay-flat binding. Perfect for both sets of parents.

deliverables.name: 2 Mini Notebook Albums
deliverables.description: Two compact notebook-style albums replicating the design and page layout of the main albums in a smaller, portable format. A charming keepsake for grandparents or the wedding party.

deliverables.name: Two Wall Calendars
deliverables.description: Two large-format wall calendars featuring a curated selection of your best wedding photographs — one image per month. Printed on premium art paper with a spiral bind. A beautiful daily reminder of your special day, gifted to family.

deliverables.name: Two Table Top Calendars
deliverables.description: Two stylish desk calendars featuring your favourite wedding photographs, designed to sit on a table or office desk. Compact, elegantly designed, and printed on premium paper. A thoughtful keepsake for parents or close family.

deliverables.name: Two Photo Frames — 12"×18"
deliverables.description: Two 12"×18" premium photo frames with your chosen wedding photographs, printed and mounted ready to hang. Available in classic wood or modern metal finish. A timeless addition to your home or a heartfelt gift for parents.

deliverables.name: Two Reels — Any Function (30 sec–1 min)
deliverables.description: Two short, punchy social media reels from any two functions of your wedding. Each reel is 30 seconds to 1 minute, music-driven, and optimised for Instagram and WhatsApp. Share your celebration with the world while your full film is still in edit.

deliverables.name: Highlight Film — 1080p Full HD (3–5 min)
deliverables.description: A professionally edited 1080p Full HD highlight film capturing the essence of your wedding in 3 to 5 minutes. Score-matched, colour-graded, and crafted to showcase your most beautiful moments. Perfect for sharing with family and on social media.

deliverables.name: Full Function Film — 1080p Full HD
deliverables.description: Complete 1080p Full HD documentary coverage of your full wedding function — every ritual, vow, speech, and dance. Duration varies based on function length. The uncut, full-resolution record of your day, delivered for families who want nothing left out.

deliverables.name: Custom Made Pendrive Box
deliverables.description: A beautifully crafted custom pendrive box containing your complete digital gallery and wedding films on a branded USB drive. Presented in a personalised keepsake box engraved or printed with your names and wedding date. A premium physical delivery of your digital memories.

eventTypes.name: Wedding Ceremony
eventTypes.description: The main wedding ceremony — Nikkah, Hindu wedding, Christian wedding, or civil ceremony.

eventTypes.name: Reception / Party
eventTypes.description: The wedding reception, dinner, and evening celebration with family and friends.

eventTypes.name: Engagement Ceremony
eventTypes.description: The formal engagement ceremony and ring exchange.

eventTypes.name: Mehendi / Haldi
eventTypes.description: Pre-wedding mehendi application, haldi ceremony, and related functions.

eventTypes.name: Pre-wedding Shoot
eventTypes.description: A dedicated pre-wedding or engagement photo session at a location of your choice.

eventTypes.name: Sangeet / Music Night
eventTypes.description: An evening of music, dance performances, and family celebrations.

eventTypes.name: Naming Ceremony
eventTypes.description: Baby naming ceremony or baptism celebration.

tiers.name: Silver
tiers.tagline: Essential wedding coverage — everything you need beautifully captured

tiers.name: Gold
tiers.tagline: Classic wedding package — cinematic films, albums & full day coverage

tiers.name: Platinum
tiers.tagline: Luxury full-service wedding — every detail captured, every memory preserved
